cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.24)
project(Meikyu LANGUAGES C)

# Builds ONLY the engine exe (the stable binary), once per machine. Every
# project build -- game dlls, shaders, ship bundles, even rebuilding this
# exe -- is a kaji target generated by the running engine. MinGW/Linux gcc
# required for game dlls: seni's layout embedding uses GNU .incbin.

set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD 99)
set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)

set(VENDOR_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../vendor")
set(SENI_DIR  "${VENDOR_DIR}/seni")
set(KANSI_DIR "${VENDOR_DIR}/kansi")
set(KAJI_DIR  "${VENDOR_DIR}/kaji")
set(DODAI_DIR "${VENDOR_DIR}/dodai")
if(WIN32)
  set(DODAI_PLATFORM "${DODAI_DIR}/dodai_windows.c")
else()
  set(DODAI_PLATFORM "${DODAI_DIR}/dodai_posix.c")
endif()

# --- SDL3 ----------------------------------------------------------------
# Windows: vendored prebuilt MinGW binaries (batteries included).
# Linux/mac: built from source once via FetchContent (shared, so game dlls
# resolve SDL symbols from the already-loaded library at dlopen time).
if(WIN32)
  list(APPEND CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH "${VENDOR_DIR}/SDL3-mingw/x86_64-w64-mingw32")
  find_package(SDL3 CONFIG REQUIRED)
else()
  include(FetchContent)
  set(SDL_SHARED ON CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
  set(SDL_STATIC OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
  set(SDL_TEST_LIBRARY OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
  FetchContent_Declare(SDL3
    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/libsdl-org/SDL.git
    GIT_TAG release-3.4.10
    GIT_SHALLOW TRUE)
  FetchContent_MakeAvailable(SDL3)
endif()

add_executable(meikyu
  "src/platform/host_main.c"
  "src/platform/project_gen.c"
  "${SENI_DIR}/seni.c"
  "${SENI_DIR}/arena.c"
  "${KANSI_DIR}/kansi.c"
  "${KAJI_DIR}/kaji.c"
  "${DODAI_PLATFORM}"
  "${DODAI_DIR}/dodai_video_sdl.c")

target_include_directories(meikyu PRIVATE src "${SENI_DIR}" "${KANSI_DIR}" "${KAJI_DIR}" "${DODAI_DIR}")
target_link_libraries(meikyu PRIVATE SDL3::SDL3)
if(NOT WIN32)
  target_link_libraries(meikyu PRIVATE pthread) # dodai's copy worker threads
endif()
target_compile_options(meikyu PRIVATE -Wall -Wextra)

if(WIN32)
  add_custom_command(TARGET meikyu POST_BUILD
    COMMAND "${CMAKE_COMMAND}" -E copy_if_different
      "${VENDOR_DIR}/SDL3-mingw/x86_64-w64-mingw32/bin/SDL3.dll"
      "$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:meikyu>/SDL3.dll")
endif()
